issues.title: Support for Huggingface Text Embeddings Inference (TEI)
issues.body:
I am trying to deploy bge embedding models without using ollama for various reasons.

I had one deployed using TEI https://huggingface.co/docs/text-embeddings-inference/local_cpu which, if I understand correctly, is not currently supported by Spring AI natively. 

The other workaround is using spring-ai-starter-model-transformers where I encountered the "Required array size too large" issue of
https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/issues/21321


I wonder if Text Embeddings Inference (TEI) of huggingface will be supported by Spring AI in the future.

comments.body: Never mind. TEI is just another OpenAI Embedding and is already supported.
